title: Paper accepted at Communications of the ACM
description: Our paper "Where Are the City Trees?" on monitoring urban trees using generative AI has been published in CACM.

title: Paper accepted at AAAI 2026
description: Adnan Firoze's paper on building instance segmentation for dense urban settlements accepted at AAAI 2026.

title: Paper accepted at CVPR 2025
description: Aocheng Li's paper on self-supervised point cloud completion for archaeological site restoration accepted at CVPR 2025.

title: Paper accepted at ICLR 2025
description: "Refine-by-Align" paper on reference-guided artifacts refinement accepted at ICLR 2025.

title: UVC Lab website launched
description: We are excited to announce the launch of the Urban Visual Computing Lab website.

title: Two papers accepted at ECCV 2024
description: COHO (city-scale urban layout generation) and EpipolarGAN (omnidirectional image synthesis) accepted at ECCV 2024.

title: Paper accepted at CVPR 2024
description: IMPRINT: Generative Object Compositing accepted at CVPR 2024.
